steps.title: Translate each type of bottle into liters
steps.content:
One-liter bottles: $x$ bottles × 1 liter per bottle = $x$ liters
Three-liter bottles: $y$ bottles × 3 liters per bottle = $3y$ liters

steps.title: Sum the contributions for the total
steps.content:
Total water = (liters from one-liter bottles) + (liters from three-liter bottles)
Total water = $x + 3y$

Since the total is 240 liters:
$$x + 3y = 240$$

This matches choice A — A is correct.
